options.label: Container-based
options.description: Pros: Portable, reproducible. Cons: Orchestration overhead.

options.label: Serverless
options.description: Pros: Auto-scaling, pay-per-use. Cons: Cold start latency.

options.label: RabbitMQ
options.description: Pros: Feature-rich, flexible routing. Cons: Operational complexity.

options.label: Kafka
options.description: Pros: High throughput, durable log. Cons: Higher latency for small messages.

options.label: Prometheus + Grafana
options.description: Pros: Open-source, flexible. Cons: Self-hosted maintenance.

options.label: Datadog
options.description: Pros: Managed, rich integrations. Cons: Vendor lock-in, cost.

options.label: Pino
options.description: Pros: Fast, JSON native. Cons: Less human-readable.

options.label: Winston
options.description: Pros: Flexible transports, popular. Cons: Slower than Pino.
